Mel.personality: Restless, busy, and awkward, constantly changing tasks with poor coordination. Extremely sensitive to heat in all forms, with a general aggravation from warmth and amelioration from cold. Complaints arise with great violence and rapidity.
Mel.mental_state: Marked by foolish, silly, childish behavior inappropriate to the situation, including nonsensical talk on serious occasions. Prone to stupor, delirium, and loquacity in acute states, with disturbance of coordination and dizziness when the eyes are shut. Ailments arise from fright, rage, vexation, jealousy, or hearing bad news.
Mel.emotional_pattern: Dominated by great sadness and constant, causeless weeping day and night, with absolute joylessness and indifference to anything that should bring happiness. Foolishly suspicious and jealous, borrowing trouble about everything, with extreme irritability. Carries a premonition and dread of death, with intense anxiety and inability to apply good fortune to oneself.
